name: url
label: URL
help: Bluesky profile URL, @handle, or handle, e.g. bsky.app/profile/handle.

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 25, max 100. Billed per result.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Responses are cached for 24 hours by default. Set false to bypass the cache and always fetch fresh data (default true).
